name: Minnie Ola Daniels, A.B.
quote: "Life to me has been nothing but misery, heartbreak and tears."
bio: Minnie Ola Daniels from Goldsboro, NC, was involved in Le Cercle Francais and the Y.W.C.A. throughout her college years. She also participated in the Political Science Club.

name: William Oscar Bunch, Jr., B.S.
bio: William Oscar Bunch, Jr. from Newark, NJ, was active in varsity sports, numerous clubs, and the Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity. He served as the Business Manager of the Student Body and participated in the Y.M.C.A.

name: Marchetta Campbell, A.B.
bio: Marchetta Campbell from Kittrell, NC, participated in the University Choir, the Gregorian Club, and was a member of the Sociology Club and Student Government.

name: Spencer E. Durant, B.S.
quote: "The happiness consists not in multitude of friends, but in their worth and choice."
bio: Spencer E. Durant from Wilmington, NC, was involved in numerous leadership roles including Omega Psi Phi Fraternity and the Y.M.C.A. Cabinet. He also participated in Dramatics Club and Student Council.

name: Marchette Carson
quote: "Those not busy being born are busy dying."
bio: Marchette Carson from Hackensack, NJ, held leadership roles in multiple sororities and participated in extracurriculars like Le Cercle Francais, Varsity Club, and Student Government.

name: Ophelia Durham, A.B.
quote: "It matters not what you do, but how she likes."
bio: Ophelia Durham from Paterson, NJ, was active in Le Cercle Francais and Eta Zeta Phi Beta Sorority. She also held positions in numerous clubs including Dramatics Club and Y.M.C.A.

name: John Alexander Mimms, B.S.
quote: "Once he had fame, he pursued it himself."
bio: John Alexander Mimms participated in varsity sports and was an editor for multiple publications. He held leadership roles as Secretary of Student Body and class president.

name: John Joseph Renfro, B.S.
bio: John Joseph Renfro was heavily involved in athletics and leadership, serving as Art Editor, player, and assistant coach in various capacities. He also contributed to several clubs and was a class president.

name: Georgia Evelyn Coles, A.B.
quote: "Man's greed for education created the need for woman as educator."
bio: Georgia Evelyn Coles participated in science and sociology clubs, as well as musical activities like Choral Society. She was also involved in student government and credit unions.

name: Frank Alston Evans, Jr., B.S.
quote: "Life is not to gobble and devour, but to be filled."
bio: Frank Alston Evans, Jr. participated actively in the Alpha Phi Alpha Fraternity, various science clubs, and the University Choral Society. He was also involved in the Y.M.C.A. and Dramatics Club.
